puzzleDescription: The ultimate loop challenge! Use a loop inside another loop (Nested Loop) to print a right-angled triangle of stars (*).
hints: The outer loop handles the rows (i = 1 to 3).
The inner loop handles the stars in each row (j = 1 to i).
Use System.out.print("*") for the inner loop and System.out.println() for the outer loop to move to the next line.
